title: Sereia Skincare Summer Breeze Luxury Scented Candle - Hand-Poured Vegan Coconut Wax with Melon, Grape & Peach Notes - Fresh Floral Scent & Cooling Coconut - 500g
features: Vegan Coconut Wax Candle: Our Sereia 'Summer Breeze' Luxury Scented Candle is made with vegan coconut wax, which burns cleanly and evenly, without emitting harmful chemicals. This makes it a great choice for eco-conscious consumers who want to enjoy the benefits of a scented candle without compromising on their values.

Refreshing Summer Scent: With refreshing notes of melon, grape, and peach, our candle transports you to paradise on a Summer Breeze. The fresh floral scent is complemented by delicate hints of fruit and cooling coconut, creating a transformative atmosphere that elevates your at-home skincare ritual.

Long-Lasting Burn Time: Our 500g candle has a burn time of approximately 60 hours, providing you with hours of luxurious scent and relaxation. To ensure an even burn and maximum scent throw, remember to trim the wick to 1cm before lighting and allow the wax to melt all the way to the outer edges of the container on the first burn.

Complements Sereia Skincare Range: Our 'Summer Breeze' Luxury Scented Candle is specially designed to complement the Sereia Skincare range, helping you to create a complete self-care ritual that nourishes your skin and your soul. The calming, transformative atmosphere created by our candle enhances the benefits of our skincare products, helping you to feel great inside and out.

Safe and Sustainable: Our candle comes with safety instructions to ensure that it is used safely and responsibly. We also use sustainable packaging materials to minimize our impact on the environment, making our candle a guilt-free indulgence that you can enjoy with peace of mind.
